# 华为主题 `huawei`

品牌红，来自华为标志色，沉稳深红。

## Logo
- 待补充（封面 cover-top 保留部门名文字）

## CSS

```css
:root {
    --primary:       #CF0A2C;
    --primary-dark:  #96001C;
    --primary-light: #E83850;
    --primary-pale:  #FFF0F2;
    --primary-dim:   rgba(207, 10, 44, 0.12);
    --cover-bg:      linear-gradient(125deg, #5A0010 0%, #960018 35%, #CF0A2C 65%, #F03050 100%);
    --section-bg:    linear-gradient(135deg, #5A0010 0%, #960018 50%, #CF0A2C 100%);
    --red:           #CF0A2C;
    --green:         #00A870;
    --orange:        #FF8800;
}
.slide-section { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5A0010 0%, #960018 50%, #CF0A2C 100%) !important; }
.slide-qa      { background: linear-gradient(125deg, #5A0010 0%, #960018 35%, #CF0A2C 65%, #F03050 100%) !important; }
```
